project: Lawless Design lion and sphere emblem
purpose: Create a refined heritage emblem for the bottom of the homepage.

overall_direction.description: A right-facing reclining lion in a refined Swiss heritage style, resting comfortably on its front legs with its head held high and one paw placed calmly on a perfect solid black sphere.

style_reference.category: Swiss private banking or European insurance line-drawing emblem
visual_language: engraved-style simplicity without excessive engraving detail

subject.attitude: Aged relaxed comfort with head held proudly upright
subject.symbolic_role: Guardian of standards, house symbol, mark of authorship and heritage

body.description: The lion lies horizontally with a long, elegant body. The posture should feel comfortable and settled, but still dignified and alert.
requirements: Front body supported by extended forelegs
Latent power rather than active movement

front_legs.description: Both front legs should extend forward. One front paw rests on the perfect black sphere. The other front paw remains grounded, helping form the horizontal base.
requirements: Paw on sphere must look deliberate and calm
Grounded paw should support the body naturally
Paws should be refined, not oversized or cartoon-like
Forelegs should create a strong, elegant base

hindquarters.description: Rear body should be folded naturally into a reclining pose, with enough mass to suggest maturity and age.

tail.description: Tail extends backward in a controlled, elegant curve, optionally with a restrained upward curl at the end.

head.description: The head is the key signal of authority, maturity, and heritage.
head.position: Held above the body line with calm poise

features.mouth: Closed or minimally indicated, never smiling or roaring

mane.description: The mane should communicate age, status, and rank. It should be fuller and more sophisticated than the current version.
treatment: Include enough detail to feel premium

sphere.description: The sphere is the existing brand symbol and must remain visually sacred.
sphere.outline: No outline unless required for reproduction

placement.description: Low and grounded in front of the lion's chest and forelegs.
placement.paw_contact: One front paw rests calmly on the upper edge or upper quadrant of the sphere.

linework.outer_contour: Slightly heavier outer contour is acceptable
linework.detail_level: More sophisticated than a simple icon, less detailed than a literal illustration
linework.scalability: Must remain clear at small sizes

balance: Lion body occupies most of the horizontal span
Sphere creates the front symbolic anchor
Head and mane create restrained vertical emphasis
The whole mark should remain compact enough to feel logo-like
composition.homepage_fit: Should sit quietly and confidently at the bottom of a homepage without feeling like a mascot or illustration.

negative_constraints: No playful interaction with the sphere
success_criteria: Feels like the emblem of an old, respected, high-status Swiss house
Signals private banking heritage and institutional trust
The lion appears mature, relaxed, and dignified
The sphere remains a perfect black brand symbol
The pose is elongated and reclining, not sitting upright
The mark is refined enough for premium stationery and homepage footer use
The image reads as heritage logo, not friendly lion icon
condensed_prompt: A right-facing reclining lion, elongated and resting comfortably on its front legs with head held high, drawn in a refined 1990s Swiss private-banking line style. The lion has a mature noble mane, calm intelligent expression, long settled body, and one front paw placed deliberately on a perfect solid black sphere. The emblem should convey grand heritage, status, restraint, institutional authority, and old Swiss house prestige. Black line illustration on transparent or white background.
